notes:
The magicolor 1600W is a USB color laser printer with a 2009 street price of $150 USD. This printer is supported by the foo2lava open software printer driver.

Consumables: Separate toner cartridges black (4500 prints, ~$79), yellow/magenta/cyan (4500 prints, ~$119 each), drum Cartridge (45000 prints, ~$149)
